name: Event Timeline App Visual Redesign - iOS Journal Swipe Recommend v25
basedOn: v24 iOS Journal Date Column Topics
note: This is a Figma reconstruction handoff file, not a native .fig source. This version moves the My Following date lower so it aligns with the latest-update row, and changes recommendation cards from persistent Follow/View buttons to swipe-revealed Follow/Unfollow actions. It preserves copy, business rules, and semantic colors, and uses no gradient fills, polygon blobs, black filled blocks, or dark filled blocks.

meta.followedTag: shown before recommendation type when followed
